abstract: A Boolean value that determines whether Photos processes the image request synchronously.
overview:
## Discussion

If `false` (the default), the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageManager/requestImage(for:targetSize:contentMode:options:resultHandler:)] method returns immediately. Depending on the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property, Photos may call your `resultHandler` block before the method returns, at some later time, or both.

If `true`, the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageManager/requestImage(for:targetSize:contentMode:options:resultHandler:)] method blocks the calling thread until image data is ready or an error occurs. Photos calls your result handler block exactly once.

# isSynchronous

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that determines whether Photos processes the image request synchronously.

## Declaration

```swift
var isSynchronous: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

If `false` (the default), the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageManager/requestImage(for:targetSize:contentMode:options:resultHandler:)] method returns immediately. Depending on the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property, Photos may call your `resultHandler` block before the method returns, at some later time, or both.

If `true`, the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageManager/requestImage(for:targetSize:contentMode:options:resultHandler:)] method blocks the calling thread until image data is ready or an error occurs. Photos calls your result handler block exactly once.
title: isSynchronous
